lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: Oh dear, oh dear. I hope this dwarf train works properly!

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: Everyone's talking about how you rescued Zanik! You're the city's hero again!

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: Visiting Keldagrim is so exciting! I never thought I'd be so far from Dorgesh-Kaan in my life!

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: These dwarves have so much more advanced technology than us. Look at this train! We could never build something like this.

lines.speaker: Cave goblin
lines.text: Keldagrim's very nice to visit, but I don't think I'd want to live there.
